in_city_mileage.description: In-city mileage (miles per gallon) of the new car model. The population is modeled as normal with advertised mean 27 mpg and standard deviation 3 mpg. The purchased car was observed to get less than 20 mpg. The answer computes P(X<20) under N(27,3) ≈ 1%, concluding the model is likely incorrect.
